mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_relation_stats WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE user_relation_stats SET follow_count = follow_count + #{delta}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = 0
UPDATE user_relation_stats SET fans_count = fans_count + #{delta}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = 0
UPDATE user_relation_stats SET subscribe_count = subscribe_count + #{delta}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = 0
UPDATE user_relation_stats SET subscribers_count = subscribers_count + #{delta}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = 0
UPDATE user_relation_stats SET block_view_count = block_view_count + #{delta}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = 0
UPDATE user_relation_stats SET block_viewed_count = block_viewed_count + #{delta}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = 0
UPDATE user_relation_stats SET block_search_count = block_search_count + #{delta}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = 0
UPDATE user_relation_stats SET block_message_count = block_message_count + #{delta}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = 0
